# Add self vars for self hosted pipelines actions and pipelines-credentials

**odgrim** commented *Feb 17, 2026*

Adds a new pipelines_actions_repo and pipelines_credentials_repo input to most workflows

When left default we use our read token. When customized we use customer org token

Relevant tests: https://github.com/gruntwork-io/pipelines/pull/530
<br />
***
